QUESTION 1 OF 2 · +250 PER CORRECT
How long do residents of Sderot have to reach shelter when a rocket is launched from Gaza?
A
45 seconds
✓
15 seconds
C
2 minutes
D
30 seconds

Sderot is less than 1 km from the Gaza fence. Residents have trained to reach shelter in 15 seconds — including children.
